page_metadata.biotools__summary: MORFEE (Mutation on Open Reading FramE annotation) is a tool (R package) that, from a VCF file, detects and annotates single nucleotide variants creating premature ATG codons.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: MORFEE (Mutation on Open Reading FramE annotation) is a tool (R package) that, from a VCF file, detects and annotates single nucleotide variants creating premature ATG codons.
